types:as-unknown-as.rule_id: R7 STANDARD 3-HIT THRESHOLD REACHED iter-030 — R16 PROMOTION QUEUED for iter-031 prep
types:as-unknown-as.note: **🚨 R7 STANDARD 3-HIT THRESHOLD REACHED iter-030** (hits 3 across iter-005, iter-006, iter-030; cumulative cycle_density 6). R-rule promotion (R16 candidate) queued for iter-031 prep. Suggested rule: 'value as unknown as Foo (the double-cast that bypasses TypeScript entirely) is forbidden in production code. Permitted only in: (a) Type-test scaffolding in *.test.ts files (reason: type-test); (b) Pragmatic framework-interop bridges where the third-party type system genuinely cannot express the relationship (reason: framework-interop-cast) — case-by-case review with documented external-issue link.' Under R16: workers/auth/src/index.ts:135 + workers/media-api/src/index.ts:129 are missing-generic-shortcut violations (use createWorker<TEnv>() instead). packages/test-utils/src/stripe-mock.ts:165 + packages/worker-utils/src/procedure/multipart-procedure.ts:279 likely qualify for reason: framework-interop-cast.

types:literal-union-drift-vs-runtime-pre.note: NEW fingerprint. ProcedurePolicy.rateLimit hand-written union ('api'|'auth'|'strict'|'public'|'webhook'|'streaming') drifts from RATE_LIMIT_PRESETS keys ('api'|'auth'|'strict'|'streaming'|'webhook'|'web'). Allows 'public' (no preset), disallows 'web' (actual preset). Track for recurrence — if recurs across packages cycles, candidate for R-rule promotion (hand-written literal unions mirroring runtime objects MUST use keyof typeof X).

web:auth-remote-broken-endpoint.note: RECURRENCE #2 (iter-029 increment). BLOCKER (feature-availability, not security exception). Forgot/forget-password typo silently breaks reset via the remote function codepath. Entangles with web:auth-form-orphan-rpc-surface — fix together. Live form-action codepath at routes/(auth)/forgot-password/+page.server.ts:29 already uses correct path; the typo lives only in auth.remote.ts:146 which has 0 consumers (Codex-ttavz.15) — blast radius CONTAINED today, fatal the moment anyone wires it. **3rd hit candidate for R7 promotion** — the pattern is sibling to R9 (auth endpoints rate-limit path-set must come from canonical framework names). If iter-030+ surfaces another instance, promote to a hard rule: 'Remote function literal endpoint paths must be matched against canonical framework constants (BetterAuth, etc.) — never hand-typed strings.'

security:missing-csp.note: **CLOSED via Round 3 Tier 7.A (commit 253ffab4).** R10 effectiveness audit at iter-029 confirms full closure: svelte.config.js:44-74 defines kit.csp.directives with mode='auto', strict script-src (no unsafe-inline, only 'self'), frame-ancestors: 'none', connect-src: 'self'; manual <script> blocks in app.html:12,22 carry nonce='%sveltekit.nonce%'. iter-003 proof at apps/web/src/__denoise_proofs__/iter-003/F2-missing-csp-and-hsts-headers.test.ts is now ACTIVE with 3 specs (positive CSP-or-HSTS detector + 2 negative-path: no unsafe-inline, frame-ancestors === 'none'). Codex-ttavz.13 is closed. Entry retained for historical traceability; no longer in active recurrence watch.

security:missing-hsts.note: **CLOSED via Round 3 Tier 7.A (commit 253ffab4).** hooks.server.ts:79-84 sets Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains in production (!dev gated to allow local HTTP dev on lvh.me). web:auth-form-orphan-rpc-surface.note: RECURRENCE #2 (iter-029 increment). 3 form() remote functions in auth.remote.ts:100,140,175 (registerForm/forgotPasswordForm/resetPasswordForm) have ZERO consumers in apps/web/src/routes/**/*.{ts,svelte} — only auth.remote.test.ts references them. Live auth flow uses traditional form actions in routes/(auth)/*/+page.server.ts. Decision pending: wire OR delete. Fallow FP taxonomy row #1 protects .remote.ts exports from blanket 'unused' deletion when surface is genuinely live; these three exports meet none of the live-surface criteria. Entangled with web:auth-remote-broken-endpoint — fix together; if wire path chosen, MUST fix Codex-ttavz.12 typo first.

web:streamed-promise-no-catch.note: First-recorded hit of pre-existing fingerprint (ref 05 §9 row 2). subscription-context.svelte.ts:104 calls promise.then() inside \$effect block without .catch(). Producer (loadOrgTiers in routes/_org/[slug]/+layout.server.ts:113) currently catches, so today this is defence-in-depth — but apps/web/CLAUDE.md streaming rule is unconditional and sibling file access-context.svelte.ts:93,102 DOES .catch() on every promise it threads through. Drift between siblings is the maintenance hazard. Track for recurrence.
